pricing_strategy.note: PSA10は希少性でプレミアム。旧裏・プロモは強気OK。現行SRは競合多いため相場の2%下。

ai_prompt_hint: This is a Japanese Pokemon card. Focus on: card name (in English), set/series, year, grading (PSA/BGS), rarity (Promo/SR/Alt Art/SAR/SEC), and whether it's vintage Carddass (Bandai) or modern TCG. For old back cards, include 'Old Back' or 'No Rarity Symbol'. Title must include 'Pokemon' and 'Japanese'. Never use One Piece or Ohtani related words.
